response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with a deep technical background in full-stack development, modern web technologies (TypeScript, React, Node.js), and advanced practices like CI/CD, DevOps, and AI integration. While he possesses all required skills and many nice-to-haves, his extensive experience and senior titles far exceed the "Junior / Mid-Level" specification for this role, potentially indicating a mismatch in career stage and expectations.
strengths: Deep proficiency in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational databases.
Extensive experience with clean architecture, TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps (AWS, Kubernetes).
Demonstrated experience in AI-agent infrastructure and ML-related concepts.
concerns: Significantly overqualified for a "Junior / Mid-Level" and "Entry level" position.
Potential for misalignment with the expected growth trajectory and responsibilities of the role.
Direct industry experience in renewable energy/construction tech is limited.
